ddls:
CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "mjd" REAL /* Modified Julian Date (MJD) of the observation */,
  "mag" REAL /* Magnitude of the object observed */,
  "mag_err" REAL /* Error in the magnitude measurement */,
  "flux" REAL /* Flux of the object observed */,
  "flux_err" REAL /* Error in the flux measurement */,
  "band" TEXT /* Band of the observation (e.g., Bessell_B, Bessell_U) */,
  "instr" TEXT /* Instrument used for the observation (e.g., Rich1994) */,
  "filter_set" TEXT /* Filter set used for the observation (e.g., GeneralFilters) */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the observation */,
  "observation_site" TEXT /* Location of the observation site */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telescope used for the observation */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific filter used */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific instrument used */,
  "seeing" REAL /* Atmospheric seeing conditions during the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "exposure_time" REAL /* Exposure time in seconds */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of data processing (e.g., raw, processed, archived) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project associated with the observation */,
  "researcher_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments from the researcher */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or groups the observation is shared with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level required to view the observation (e.g., public, private, restricted) */,
  "audit_log" TEXT /* Log of changes and access to the observation record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the observer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the observer is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the observer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the telescope */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope */,
  "aperture" REAL /* Aperture size of the telescope */,
  "focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the telescope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telescope record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telescope record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the instrument (e.g., CCD, spectrograph) */,
  "wavelength_range" TEXT /* Wavelength range the instrument can detect */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the instrument */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instrument record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the filter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Central wavelength of the filter */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the filter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the filter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
